signature: def solve(series_list: list[str], threshold: float) -> int:
prompt: Implement solve(series_list, threshold). Parse each series, merge them all, and count how many merged values exceed the threshold.
Implement solve(series_list). Parse each series, apply min-max normalization to each, and return a list of the maximum normalized value from each series.
hidden_tests: assert len(solve(['NIM|1:A1,2:B2,3:C3'])) == 1 and all(abs(a - b) < 1e-9 for a, b in zip(solve(['NIM|1:A1,2:B2,3:C3']), [1.0]))
assert len(solve(['NIM|1:A1', 'NIM|2:B2'])) == 2 and all(abs(a - b) < 1e-9 for a, b in zip(solve(['NIM|1:A1', 'NIM|2:B2']), [0.0, 0.0]))
assert len(solve(['NIM|1:A0,2:G9', 'NIM|1:A0,2:G9'])) == 2 and all(abs(a - b) < 1e-9 for a, b in zip(solve(['NIM|1:A0,2:G9', 'NIM|1:A0,2:G9']), [1.0, 1.0]))
assert len(solve(['NIM|1:A1,2:A1', 'NIM|1:B2,2:B2'])) == 2 and all(abs(a - b) < 1e-9 for a, b in zip(solve(['NIM|1:A1,2:A1', 'NIM|1:B2,2:B2']), [0.0, 0.0]))

prompt: Implement solve(series_list). Parse each series, merge them all, and return the full statistical summary of the merged series.
hidden_tests: assert solve([])['count'] == 0 and abs(solve([])['min'] - 0.0) < 1e-9 and abs(solve([])['max'] - 0.0) < 1e-9 and abs(solve([])['mean'] - 0.0) < 1e-9 and abs(solve([])['std'] - 0.0) < 1e-9

assert solve(['NIM|1:A1', 'NIM|2:B2'])['count'] == 2 and abs(solve(['NIM|1:A1', 'NIM|2:B2'])['min'] - 1.1) < 1e-9 and abs(solve(['NIM|1:A1', 'NIM|2:B2'])['max'] - 2.2) < 1e-9 and abs(solve(['NIM|1:A1', 'NIM|2:B2'])['mean'] - 1.6500000000000001) < 1e-9 and abs(solve(['NIM|1:A1', 'NIM|2:B2'])['std'] - 0.55) < 1e-9

assert solve(['NIM|1:A0', 'NIM|2:G9'])['count'] == 2 and abs(solve(['NIM|1:A0', 'NIM|2:G9'])['min'] - 1.0) < 1e-9 and abs(solve(['NIM|1:A0', 'NIM|2:G9'])['max'] - 7.9) < 1e-9 and abs(solve(['NIM|1:A0', 'NIM|2:G9'])['mean'] - 4.45) < 1e-9 and abs(solve(['NIM|1:A0', 'NIM|2:G9'])['std'] - 3.45) < 1e-9

assert solve(['NIM|1:A1,2:A1', 'NIM|3:A1'])['count'] == 3 and abs(solve(['NIM|1:A1,2:A1', 'NIM|3:A1'])['min'] - 1.1) < 1e-9 and abs(solve(['NIM|1:A1,2:A1', 'NIM|3:A1'])['max'] - 1.1) < 1e-9 and abs(solve(['NIM|1:A1,2:A1', 'NIM|3:A1'])['mean'] - 1.1) < 1e-9 and abs(solve(['NIM|1:A1,2:A1', 'NIM|3:A1'])['std'] - 0.0) < 1e-9
